scope: KMU RecSys 26 Steam paper-guided no-submit exploration

selected_paper_families.title: Unbiased Recommender Learning from Implicit Feedback via Weakly Supervised Learning (PURL)
selected_paper_families.project_action: Implement PU/weak-supervised or corrected weighted implicit loss as candidate score axis; combine with top-half calibration.

selected_paper_families.title: Towards Reliable Negative Sampling for Recommendation with Implicit Feedback via In-Community Popularity
selected_paper_families.project_action: Build community-aware validation negatives using ALS/SVD user communities and in-community popular unseen items.

selected_paper_families.title: TFPS: Temporal Filtration-enhanced Positive Sample Set Construction Method for Implicit Collaborative Filtering
selected_paper_families.project_action: Sweep time-decay edge weights and recent-positive filtered graphs.

selected_paper_families.title: Correct and Weight: A Simple Yet Effective Loss for Implicit Feedback Recommendation
selected_paper_families.project_action: Weight sampled negatives by reliability/popularity/community exposure and correct false-negative risk.

selected_paper_families.title: LightGCL: Simple Yet Effective Graph Contrastive Learning for Recommendation
selected_paper_families.project_action: Use SVD/global graph features first; postpone full contrastive training until auxiliary gain is proven.

selected_paper_families.title: SymCERE: Symmetric Contrastive Learning for Robust Review-Enhanced Recommendation
selected_paper_families.project_action: Use train review profiles as semantic cluster/regularizer only; not as a direct hidden-label oracle.

selected_paper_families.title: CPGRec+: A Balance-oriented Framework for Personalized Video Game Recommendations
selected_paper_families.project_action: Approximate categories with train-only interaction/text clusters; do not scrape Steam metadata.

review_tfidf_probe.interpretation: TF-IDF user-item review cosine is not strong enough as a standalone scorer; retain as semantic cluster or blend axis candidate.

recommended_next_steps: Implement PURL/CW-style weighted implicit scorer and blend with current Stage2.
Sweep time-decay edge weights for EASE/ItemKNN/ALS and validate on recent + sqrt-pop.
Use train-only review embeddings for pseudo-category clusters if pop-bin complementary gain is observed.
Defer full graph contrastive/LLM training until cheap axes show consistent validation gain.

promotion_gates.primary: Improve val_random_sqrtpop_seed42 over current Stage2 or provide low-correlation blend gain.
promotion_gates.stress: No material degradation on val_recent_sqrtpop_seed42 and val_random_popbin_seed42.
promotion_gates.constraints: Per-user top-half positive counts preserved; no external Steam scraping; reproducible code/seed/data fingerprint.
